description_long: This is a stylized doll with a large, rounded head and exaggerated facial features, including oversized green and black eyes with white pupils. The doll has short, angular black hair with pointed side sections and a simple, cartoonish face with a small, smiling mouth. It wears a sleeveless black top with a green skirt and a white waistband, along with white socks and black shoes. The arms are outstretched horizontally, and the legs are short and cylindrical. The overall design is inspired by animated characters, with a smooth, glossy finish and minimal surface detail. The doll's proportions are highly exaggerated, giving it a playful and whimsical appearance.
description: A cartoonish doll with a large head, green and black eyes, short black hair, and a green skirt with black shoes. The design is smooth, glossy, and highly stylized.
description_view_0: Front view showing the doll's large green and black eyes, smiling mouth, and outstretched arms.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the rounded head, angular hair, and the profile of the face and body.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the smooth, rounded back of the head and the back of the skirt and shoes.
description_view_3: Angled rear-side view showing the hair's shape, the side of the face, and the back of the body.
attribute_clothing_style: Sleeveless black top with a bright green skirt and a white waistband, paired with white socks and black Mary Jane-style shoes; the outfit is simple and cartoon-inspired.
attribute_pose: Arms extended horizontally to the sides, legs straight and close together, head facing forward, and torso upright in a static, neutral stance.
attribute_facial_expression: Smiling expression with wide, open eyes and a small, curved mouth; eyebrows are not visible, giving a cheerful and neutral emotional cue.
attribute_hair_style: Short, straight black hair with angular, pointed side sections and a smooth, helmet-like shape.
